title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TransIndia Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TransIndia Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the TransIndia Logistics family as a Distribution Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TransIndia Logistics:
TransIndia Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TransIndia Logistics!
